steps.title: Identify the main point
steps.content: The passage's central claim is explicit: these paintings played a role in shaping how Florida is perceived, with their characteristic landscape imagery becoming emblematic of the state.

steps.title: Match the argument to the choices
steps.content:
Choice D correctly identifies the main purpose: the passage argues that Highwaymen paintings helped create a particular widespread impression of Florida.

The opening painting exemplifies the typical imagery that accomplished this cultural work.

The other three choices misidentify the passage's focus—one treats it as describing a resurgence, one inflates a single work's role, one invents a time-period contrast.

That matches choice D — D is correct.
